items.headline: MiSTer Companion v4.4.0 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v4.4.0 is now available.

This release adds ZapScraper, a new Offline Mode tool for scraping artwork for the Zaparoo Frontend directly to a MiSTer SD card or a custom local/network location.

This update also adds safer SD card eject handling, a new CD Game Organizer script, improved update_all output readability, RetroAchievements Cores updates, and more.

items.headline: MC-Updater Is Now Available
items.message:
MC-Updater is now available for both Windows and Linux.

MC-Updater is a small companion tool for MiSTer Companion that makes future updates easier by handling the update process for you.

Once MC-Updater is installed, MiSTer Companion will recognize the updater tool. When a supported update is available, MiSTer Companion can launch MC-Updater to download and replace the old MiSTer Companion executable automatically.
